summary: Comprehensive testing of Paw Paradise multi-product pet management platform completed. All three product logins (Service Provider, Vet Clinic, Shelter) working correctly. All Add/Create functionality buttons open slide panels as expected. Backend API tests: 19/19 passed (100%).
passed_tests: ✅ Vet Staff page 'Add Staff' button opens slide panel
✅ Vet Patients page 'New Patient' button opens slide panel
✅ Vet Appointments page 'New Appointment' button opens slide panel
✅ Shelter Animals page 'New Intake' button opens multi-step wizard (3 steps)
✅ Shelter Volunteers page 'Add Volunteer' button opens slide panel
✅ Shelter Daily Ops page 'Add Task' button opens slide panel
✅ Backend Auth API - All 3 product logins working
✅ Backend Vet APIs - Staff, Patients, Appointments, Clients, Dashboard Stats
✅ Backend Shelter APIs - Animals, Volunteers, Tasks, Dashboard Stats
✅ Backend Provider APIs - Profile, Dashboard Stats, Bookings
✅ CRUD operations - Create staff, animals, volunteers with cleanup
critical_code_review_comments: Minor ESLint warnings in ShelterDailyOps.js and VetAppointments.js about missing useEffect dependencies - not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Demo data is seeded in-memory on server startup for all three products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three product logins and Add/Create functionality verified working. Backend uses in-memory demo data that resets on server restart. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_and_products.py covers auth and CRUD for all products.
